sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in Hong Diksak ding ci-in Job in a Upna

verses.text: Tua ciangin Job in dawng a
“Bang tanvei thu genin hong gimsak ding na hi hiam
Kei nong simmawh niloh a, tua banga na gamtatna-ah maizumna mel na nei thei kei hi
A khial takpi hi ta leng zong nang' lainatna ding bang om ahi hiam
Keimah sangin a hoihzaw-in nang na kingaihsun a, ka thuak gimnate pen keima mawhna hangin na ngaihsun hi
Hih thu hong piangsakpa Pasian ahihlam mu theilo na hi hiam? Kei hong matna dingin amah in thang hong siah hi
Keimah hong ngongbawlna ka nialnial hangin kuamah in hong don kei hi. Thuman ka deih hangin hong kipia kei hi
Pasian in ka lampi khaktan a, ka paisuakzo kei hi. Amah in ka paina ding lampi khua mialcipsak hi
Amah in ka hauhna khempeuh hong lakkhiatsak a, ka min hoih kimlai hong siasak hi
Amah in ka pumpi khempeuh hong satgawp hi. Ka nopsakna teng hong zunglot sakin, vulgawpin a si dingin kei a hong nusia hi
Keima tungah Pasian' hehna hong sogawp a, ama gal lian penin kei a hong ngaihsun hi
Amah in keimah a sim dingin a galkapte hong sawl a, a galkapte in dum to-in ka buk hong umcih uh hi
“Pasian in ka sanggamte hong taisansak a, kei hong theisate kiangah khualmi ka suak hi
Ka behte leh ka lawmte beimang khinta uh hi
Ka inn-ah a hong tung ngei keima zinte in hong mangngilh ta a, ka na a sem numeite in khualmi bangin hong bawl uh a, amaute' mai-ah midangpi khat ka suak hi
Ka nasemte khatpeuh ka sap ciangin hong dawng nuamlo uh a, hong huhna ding uh ka thum ciang nangawnin hong thudonlo uh hi
Ka zi nangawn in ka gimnam thuak zolo a, ka sanggamte mahmah in zong hong naih nuamlo uh hi
Naupang melmawl nangawn in kei hong simmawh uh a, kei hong muh uh ciangin hong nuihsan uh hi
Ka lawm it pente nangawn in kei hong muhdah et uh a, ka it pente nangawn in kei hong langbawl uh hi
Ka guh tungah ka vun kol dihdiahin om a, a nungta liailiai bekin kei a om ka hi hi
Hong hehpih un! Hong hehpih un! Keima lawmte hilo na hi uh hiam? Pasian in kei hong satpai ta hi
Pasian' hong bawlsiat bangin bang hangin no zong kei hong bawlsia ding na hi uh hiam? Nong gimsakna uh kicing ta hoh hilo ahi hiam
“Ka thugente khempeuh mi khatpeuh in ciamteh hen la, laibu khat sungah a khum hi leh ut mahmah ing
Tua ahih kei leh zong, ka thugente khempeuh sikkhu khat tawh suang tungah kikhen hen la, a mang ngei nawnlo dingin a kigelh hi leh ut ing
“Ahi zongin a tawpna-ah kei hong pan'pih ding a nungta tawntung khat vantungah a omna thu ka thei hi
Natna in ka vun a nektum khit hangin, hih ka pumpi mahmah tawh Pasian ka mu ding hi
Keima mit teekteek tawh amah ka mu ding a, amah in kei hong khualmi etlo ding hi. “Ka lungsim han'na a bei hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh, ‘Amah bangci gimsak thei ding ihi hiam?’ na ci uh hi. Kei nong suktheihna dingun paulap khatpeuh na zong uh hi
Ahi zongin tu-in namsau kihta un. Tua namsau in a mawhte tungah Pasian' hehna hong sem ding hi. Tua ciangin thukhen ding khat a omlam na thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
